title: Agent Browser Configuration
description: Configuration file for agent-browser (e.g., agent-browser.json or ~/.agent-browser/config.json)

headed.description: Show browser window instead of running headless.

restore.description: Auto-save/restore persistence key. A bare CLI --restore uses the current session; config values use this explicit key.

restoreCheckUrl.description: URL glob that restored state must match before auto-save.

restoreCheckText.description: Visible page text that restored state must expose before auto-save.

restoreCheckFn.description: JavaScript expression that must evaluate truthy before restored state is auto-saved.

namespace.description: Namespace that isolates daemon sockets and restore-state directories.

sessionName.description: Legacy alias for restore persistence key.

executablePath.description: Path to a custom browser executable.

extensions.description: Paths to browser extensions. Extensions from user-level and project-level configs are concatenated.

initScripts.description: Page init script paths registered before navigation.

profile.description: Path to the browser profile data directory.

proxyBypass.description: Comma-separated domains to bypass the proxy (e.g., localhost,*.internal.com).

args.description: Additional comma-separated launch arguments for the browser.

device.description: Device name or identifier for emulation or providers (e.g., 'iPhone 16 Pro').

hideScrollbars.description: Hide native scrollbars in headless Chromium screenshots. Defaults to true.

allowFileAccess.description: Allow file:// URLs to access local files.

autoConnect.description: Auto-discover and connect to a running Chrome instance.

annotate.description: Annotated screenshot with numbered element labels.

contentBoundaries.description: Wrap page output in boundary markers for LLM safety.

maxOutput.description: Max characters for page output (truncates beyond limit).

actionPolicy.description: Path to action policy JSON file.

confirmInteractive.description: Enable interactive confirmation prompts (auto-denies if stdin is not a TTY).

idleTimeout.description: Auto-shutdown the daemon after inactivity (e.g., '30s', '5m', '1h', or raw milliseconds like '60000').

noAutoDialog.description: Disable automatic dismissal of alert/beforeunload dialogs.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers supplied as a JSON-formatted string.

plugins.description: External plugin registry. Project-level entries are appended after user-level entries, and duplicate names resolve to the later entry.

name.description: Plugin name used by commands such as auth login --credential-provider.

command.description: Executable path or command name for the plugin process.

args.description: Optional arguments passed to the plugin process. Do not store secrets here.

capabilities.description: Capabilities declared by the plugin. Built-in capability names include credential.read, browser.provider, launch.mutate, and command.run; plugins may also declare custom names such as captcha.solve.

source.description: Optional source recorded by agent-browser plugin add, such as npm:agent-browser-plugin-example or github:owner/repo.
